value.found_quote: Autonomous local agents operate with highest accuracy when complex changes are partitioned into distinct exploration, planning, and execution phases. - **Exploration**: Ask the agent to explain how the target codebase resolves a particular problem or where an interface is defined before writing any changes. - **Planning**: Request an implementation plan. The agent will list targeted files, required dependencies, and logic overrides in an implementation plan artifact. - **Execution**: Once you approve the structured plan, direct the agent to apply the edits.
value.name: Explore, plan, then execute
